title: Koanophyllon triradiatum
taxonomy: Koanophyllon triradiatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Koanophyllon. The plant is native to Mexico, and its classification is within the tribe Eupatorieae. The classification of Koanophyllon triradiatum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae. The plant's classification is also recognized in the order Asterales.
uses: Unfortunately, I don't have any information about the medicinal uses of Koanophyllon triradiatum.
